name: utils
description: Collection of low-level helper functions and external library configurations used across the application.

subfolders.name: supabase
subfolders.description: Supabase connection utilities for different execution contexts.

subfiles.name: client.ts
subfiles.description: Client-side Supabase instance using environment public keys.

subfiles.name: server.ts
subfiles.description: Server-side client with cookie handling for Next.js SSR/ISR.

subfiles.name: proxy.ts
subfiles.description: Utility for routing Supabase requests through internal proxies.

subfolders.name: payments
subfolders.description: Logic for handling transactions and gateway integrations.

subfiles.name: svgToPng.ts
subfiles.description: Utility function to convert SVG chart elements into PNG buffers for PDF compatibility.
